Engagement Funnel
What People Are Doing
How people are using Claude.ai
  • Chats (% active) - Primary use case. Daily Q&A, research, drafting, problem-solving across the org.
  • Projects (% active) - Persistent context for ongoing client work. Getting to 40%+ would significantly compound value.
  • Artifacts (% active) - Structured outputs: dashboards, code files, documents. Almost entirely untapped - training opportunity.

Daily Active Users - May 2026 Source: Claude Admin daily graph · Weekdays only · ~2 day lag
Cowork context
Cowork was separated from Claude Code metrics after March 27, 2026 - previously its usage was counted under Claude Code. Averaging daily active users this month. Per-dept Cowork counts are shown in the Dept Scorecard, derived from per-user Claude Admin API data.
